summary: Iteration 46 - V2 Outils d'accompagnement and Consent System testing. All 16 backend tests passed. Frontend V2 features verified: 12 fiches in 5 phases, decision blocks with 3 fields, consent manager with 3 levels (synthese/modulaire/complet_temporaire), module selection for modulaire level.

issues: Minor: DialogContent missing aria-describedby (console warning) - cosmetic only

seed_data_creation: Used existing 4 beneficiaires. Created test consents during backend testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: V2 Outils d'accompagnement fully functional. 12 fiches organized in 5 phases (diagnostic, bilan_pro, identite_valeurs, strategie, activation). Each fiche has decision block with 3 fields (_decision_je_decide, _decision_je_arrete, _decision_je_teste). Fiche 12 is 'Mon plan d'activation'. Consent system supports 3 levels: synthese (summary only), modulaire (user selects modules), complet_temporaire (all 12 modules). Consent endpoints: POST/GET/PUT/DELETE /api/partenaires/consent. GET /api/partenaires/consent-modules returns 12 modules.

backend_api.GET_partenaires_outils_fiches: PASSED - Returns 12 V2 fiches with correct phases
backend_api.fiches_have_correct_phases: PASSED - 5 phases: diagnostic, bilan_pro, identite_valeurs, strategie, activation
backend_api.PUT_beneficiaires_bilan_with_decision_bl: PASSED - Saves fiche data including _decision_* fields
backend_api.GET_beneficiaires_bilan: PASSED - Retrieves saved V2 fiche data with decision blocks
backend_api.POST_consent_modulaire: PASSED - Creates consent with level 'modulaire' and modules
backend_api.POST_consent_complet_temporaire: PASSED - Creates consent with all 12 modules
backend_api.GET_consent_returns_status_remaining_day: PASSED - Returns consents with status and remaining_days
backend_api.DELETE_consent_revokes: PASSED - Revokes consent and sets revoked_at

frontend_ui.5_phases_displayed: PASSED - Diagnostic initial, Bilan professionnel, Identite et valeurs, Strategie et trajectoire, Activation
frontend_ui.12_fiche_cards: PASSED - 12 fiche cards displayed organized by phase
frontend_ui.decision_block_section: PASSED - 'Bloc decisionnel' section visible in fiche editor
frontend_ui.decision_field_je_decide: PASSED - 'Ce que je decide' field present
frontend_ui.decision_field_je_teste: PASSED - 'Ce que je teste' field present
frontend_ui.consent_level_complet_temporaire: PASSED - Complet temporaire level option displayed
frontend_ui.existing_consents_displayed: PASSED - Shows existing consents with status and remaining days
frontend_ui.revoke_button: PASSED - Revoke button visible for active consents
